ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., '5-3') */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "AB" INTEGER /* At bats (AB) */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Runs (R) */,
  "H" INTEGER /* Hits (H) */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Runs batted in (RBI) */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Home runs (HR) */,
  "BB" INTEGER /* Walks (BB) */,
  "SO" INTEGER /* Strikeouts (SO) */,
  "LOB" INTEGER /* Left on base (LOB) */,
  "AVG" REAL /* Batting average (AVG) */,
  "OBP" REAL /* On-base percentage (OBP) */,
  "SLG" REAL /* Slugging percentage (SLG) */,
  "OPS" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) */,
  "FPTS" INTEGER /* Fantasy points (FPTS) */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning the statistic occurred in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was playing for */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach works for */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Pitching Coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "fire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was fired (if applicable) */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the report references */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the report is about */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis performed */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., pitching, batting, etc.) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations made in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player with the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., hamstring, concussion) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to recover */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., day-to-day, out for season) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the injury was diagnosed */,
  "recovery_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the player's recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy league */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the league */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of fantasy league (e.g., head-to-head, rotisserie) */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Prize pool for the league */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy league the roster belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player is playing in the fantasy league */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player in the fantasy league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_rosters_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id")
)
